who: HR ops managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month
offer: For HR ops managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month, manual compilation causes delays in payroll reporting. We simplify summary generation instead of manual spreadsheet compilation and email distribution.
problem: Manual compilation of payroll summaries is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR ops managers
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll workflows
DM outreach to HR ops managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing payroll tools
try_it: Let users try Email distribution and User-friendly dashboard for summaries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
